Pickens to play on $27.3M tag as deadline passes
stories.summary: Cowboys wide receiver George Pickens will officially play the 2026 season on his $27.3 million franchise tender after Wednesday's 4 p.m. ET deadline for tagged players to agree to long-term contracts passed.

stories.title: Reports: Brewers finalizing trade for McCullers
stories.summary: The Astros have traded right-hander Lance McCullers Jr., their longest-tenured pitcher, and lefty Colton Gordon to the Brewers for minor league outfielder Jadyn Fielder.

stories.title: NC State coach: QB Bailey could be country's best
stories.summary: Few quarterbacks in college football are better positioned for a breakthrough 2026 season than NC State's CJ Bailey.

stories.title: Miami's Mensah: Ward, Beck factored into transfer
stories.summary: New Miami QB Darian Mensah said that the success Cam Ward and Carson Beck had in Coral Gables was a 'huge factor' in his decision to transfer from Duke.
